title: memecylon phanerophlebium
intro: Memecylon phanerophlebium, also known as the Malayana or Malayana tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Memecylon phanerophlebium are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, and its extracts are used to treat various ailments.
